classes.purpose: Map selected entries and resolve accounting-support checks
classes.content: User instructions; journal entries; FatturaPA data or connector exports; supporting PDFs; match results; evidence excerpts and review decisions

boundaries_beyond_codex.purpose: Acquire an invoice ZIP or folder export when the user chooses connection instead of supplying local support
boundaries_beyond_codex.content: Authorized read/export request for the selected client and period; the resulting export is then processed locally
controls: Use only a callable provider-specific connector after the user chooses it and confirms access authority.
Restrict the action to read/export for the selected client and period.
Vera and the helper scripts do not request credentials, tokens, cookies, or one-time codes.

security_controls.control: Helper scripts receive a local connector export and do not authenticate to or call accounting-provider APIs.
Run artifacts are written outside published repository paths.
